india_trends.title: US stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq futures edge higher after record highs; Brent below $98
india_trends.summary: US stock futures showed modest gains on 7 May, following record highs amid hopes of a US-Iran peace deal. Stocks rose with easing tensions and strong earnings, while crude oil prices declined, alleviating inflation fears and prompting speculation about potential Federal Reserve rate cuts.

india_trends.title: Broad-based sector stress drove ECLGS 5.0 rollout, says finance secretary
india_trends.summary: On Wednesday, the government approved the scheme with a total outlay of ₹2.55 trillion, including a dedicated ₹5,000 crore window for airlines. The scheme allows additional credit of up to 20% of peak working capital utilised for eligible borrowers affected by the conflict.

india_trends.title: Sebi discontinues investor risk reduction access platform for stock brokers
india_trends.summary: Market regulator Sebi on Thursday discontinued the Investor Risk Reduction Access (IRRA) platform for stock brokers with immediate effect, citing its redundancy amid stronger business continuity and cyber resilience frameworks in the securities market.

india_trends.title: Indiabulls Real Estate case: Four entities pay Rs 10.5 cr to Sebi as settlement
india_trends.summary: Market regulator Sebi on Thursday settled proceedings against four entities in a case related to alleged diversion of funds involving erstwhile Indiabulls Real Estate Ltd after they paid a total settlement of about Rs 10.49 crore.

india_trends.title: BSE Q4 Results: Profit surges 61% YoY to ₹797 crore; ₹10 dividend announced
india_trends.summary: BSE posted a 61% year-on-year increase in its consolidated net profit to ₹797.33 crore for the January-March quarter (Q4) of the financial year 2025-26 (FY26).&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Quote of the day Philip Fisher: "I think a weakness of many people’s approach to investment is that they try to be jacks of all trades and masters of none."
india_trends.summary: Philip Fisher's insight warns against investors spreading themselves too thin, advocating for deep expertise over superficial diversification. Chasing trends without understanding leads to reactive decisions, while focused research in specific areas builds an edge. Mastery in a few chosen strategies

india_trends.title: BSE Q4 Results: Cons PAT jumps 61% YoY to Rs 797 crore, revenue soars 85%; Rs 10/share dividend announced
india_trends.summary: India's oldest exchange, BSE, reported a significant 61% surge in its consolidated net profit, reaching Rs 797 crore for the March-ended quarter. This impressive growth was accompanied by an 85% revenue increase, with the company posting Rs 1,564 crore in Q4FY26 compared to Rs 847 crore in the prior

Alpha Corp to invest Rs 900 cr to complete stalled projects in Delhi-NCR; relief for 3k customers
india_trends.summary: Realty firm Alpha Corp Development Ltd will invest nearly Rs 900 crore to complete three stalled housing and commercial projects in Greater Noida and Gurugram, a development that would provide relief to more than 3,000 existing customers.

india_trends.title: ECLGS 5.0 to help SBI open ₹70,000–₹80,000 crore credit line: Chairman CS Setty
india_trends.summary: In a pivotal stride towards economic recovery, the government has unveiled ECLGS 5.0, aimed at fortifying MSMEs and the airline industry amidst ongoing challenges. With an unprecedented allocation of Rs 2.55 lakh crore in extra credit, State Bank of India is gearing up to contribute around Rs 70,000

Adani Green Energy and 4 other stocks hit a 52-week high, rally up to 48% in a month
india_trends.summary: Five BSE 100 LargeMidcap TMC stocks, including Adani Green, Polycab and Nestle India, hit fresh 52-week highs despite broader market softness, rallying up to 48% in a month.

india_trends.title: CAG conducting special audit of 101 cities to assess ease of living, says Murthy
india_trends.summary: India is auditing 101 cities to understand citizen ease of living. The Comptroller and Auditor General is also examining transport and logistics. This is part of a BRICS summit in Bengaluru focusing on urban mobility. Cities are vital for India's GDP and job creation. Effective urban mobility requir

india_trends.title: Everstone Capital acquires Germany’s Qlar Group in $150-200 million deal
india_trends.summary: The acquisition underscores Singapore-based Everstone’s push to back global manufacturing and engineering businesses with significant operations in India and Asia.
